body: Confirmed on my end. Row with empty brood count drops without a warning. Logged the CSV that did it.
Tested the patch against last season's file. Imports clean now. Thanks.
Mite counts per inspection would save me a separate notebook. Twelve colonies here if you want test data.
Set units to pounds, season total still reads metric. Screenshot attached.
Either make the field truly optional or fix the docs. Right now the form blocks a blank.
Strips went in on a Sunday, reminder hit Monday. Off by one matches the schedule code.
Web view shows the full note, PDF cuts it at about two lines. Long entries only.
Re-entering overwintered counts every spring is the one chore I skip. Tag would fix it.
Ran a 7-player field three times. Same low seed gets the bye each round.
Sonneborn-Berger is what we use for club ties. Buchholz alone is not enough.
Names with commas, like Last, First, split into extra columns. Quoting the field fixes it.
Attached the full pairing log for the 24-player run. Two boards never crossed.
Printout reads 15:10. Members keep asking if that is fifteen-ten time. Should be 15+10.
Comment after the promotion move vanishes on replay. Earlier comments hold fine.
Nimzo count is higher than the linked base. Looks like the transposition gets added twice.
Verified on the latest build. Counts line up now.
Browsing a sideline flips the board back to white. Would rather it stayed as set.
Most of my nucs are eight-frame. Hard-coding ten throws off the calc.
Quart batch came back 1.9:1. Gallon batch was fine. Rounding on small mixes.
Suggested README wording in the PR. Adds the activate step before install.
